books.title: The Pothunters
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: The theft of sports trophies from an English public school has unexpected implications on the lives of the school’s students and masters.

books.title: Treasure Island
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.summary: A young boy finds adventure on the high seas as he battles bloodthirsty pirates in search of a long-lost treasure.

books.title: The Autobiography of Ma-Ka-Tai-Me-She-Kia-Kiak, or Black Hawk
books.author: Black Hawk
books.summary: The autobiography of Black Hawk, the famous leader of the Native American Sauk tribe and central figure in the Black Hawk War of 1832.

books.title: Personal Recollections of Joan of Arc
books.author: Mark Twain
books.summary: A fictional biography of Joan of Arc from her early teenage years to her martyrdom.

books.title: Little Lord Fauntleroy
books.author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
books.summary: A poor young boy unexpectedly inherits a peerage and travels to England to live with his grandfather, an Earl.

books.title: Fanny’s First Play
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: A young woman writes a play to shock her father, in which two respectable families deal with their with disreputable children.

books.title: Romeo and Juliet
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: The children of two opposing houses fall in love.

books.title: The Master Mind of Mars
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: A new hero from Earth reaches Mars and battles a merchant of purloined youth.

books.title: The Swiss Family Robinson
books.author: Johann David Wyss
books.summary: A Swiss family is shipwrecked on a remote island in the East Indies.

books.title: The Room in the Dragon Volant
books.author: J. Sheridan Le Fanu
books.summary: After an Englishman traveling in France meets a mysterious woman, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous intrigue.

books.title: The Interesting Narrative of the Life of Olaudah Equiano
books.author: Olaudah Equiano
books.summary: An autobiography of an ex-slave in the mid 1700s.

books.title: The Powerhouse
books.author: John Buchan
books.summary: A secret criminal organization is uncovered after an M.P.’s friend goes missing.

books.title: The Life of Buffalo Bill
books.author: William F. Cody
books.summary: The 1879 autobiography of William F. Cody, more commonly known as Buffalo Bill, detailing his early life in the American West.

books.title: Mutual Aid
books.author: Peter Kropotkin
books.summary: Kropotkin explores the role of cooperation in animal societies and human societies, past and present, and how it could benefit modern society.

books.title: Idylls of the King
books.author: Alfred, Lord Tennyson
books.summary: Twelve poems detailing the adventures of Arthur’s round table.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s short fiction, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Invaders from the Infinite
books.author: John W. Campbell
books.summary: Three scientists join with an alien race to defeat an attacking force.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by F. Scott Fitzgerald, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Demian
books.author: Hermann Hesse
books.summary: A boy goes on a journey of spiritual growth.

books.title: To Cuba and Back
books.author: Richard Henry Dana Jr.
books.summary: A captivating travel memoir recounting an 1859 journey to Cuba, offering vivid descriptions of the island’s culture, landscapes, and people.
